Dream Key
A mysterious key that can open the
door which links different dream
sceneries to one another.
Get closer to the monster.
The target will be defeated when
its HP reaches 0. Each target's HP is
displayed in a bar above its head.
When the HP reaches 0, you or an ally
will be on the verge of death and will
become unable to act. If all party members
are on the verge of death, it will result
in a Game Over.
Please be cautious.
Combat System Features
Combat System Features
Combat System Features
Monsters wander inside dungeons or outdoors.
Battles will play out the same in both
environments. The screen display and
controls will not change.
As you get closer, monsters will
start to attack you, but you
can attack them first.
Let's get even closer to the monster.
You will see a red marker as you approach
monsters and enemies.
When you press  while the red marker is
displayed, the main character will begin to
attack that target. From there on, he will
continue attacking the target automatically.
Furthermore, when the enemy target has been
decided, a target-lock will be displayed
around its HP meter. A yellow aura around
the main character indicates that you
or the enemy has dealt out an attack.
Please note that if you perform other
actions, such as moving during an attack,
the attack will be cancelled.
Once an attack is made, the next
action cannot be performed until
the time on the ATW Gauge has run out.
The ATW Gauge is displayed in yellow
at the bottom of the screen. This bar
is the remaining time before the character
can perform another action.
ATW Gauge
ATW Gauge
ATW Gauge
Moving while time on the ATW Gauge remains
is only possible for the main character.
However, when you move, your automatic
attack will be cancelled.
When another character receives an attack,
he or she will have to wait until time on
the ATW Gauge has ran out. He or she may
not be able to move while surrounded by
enemies, so be careful.
You can make characters assume a defensive
position where they stand by pressing
and choosing Defend in the Command Menu.
While characters are defending, they can
reduce the damage they receive from their
opponents. However, they will not be able
to defend while there is still time
remaining on the ATW Gauge.

Would you like an explanation on using
magic and items?
In order to cast magic, first select
the character who will cast the spell,
then select the desired spell from
the menu. Next, select the magic level
of the spell.
After the character is done casting the
spell, you can select a target to
unleash the spell on.
Aside from healing magic, you can
also use items to recover HP.
The effects of items are immediate,
but you can only hold nine of each
type of item.
Unlike items, magic takes time and
consumes MP when used. Make sure to
use magic that best suits the situation.
Green radar dots and HP bars belong to
allies that you should protect.
They are called NPCs (non-player
characters).
NPCs getting killed will in many cases
result in a Game Over. Be careful.
You should protect them from being
attacked by monsters or other enemies,
especially NPCs like villagers who
have no way of defending themselves.
Dots of ally characters who have lost more
than half of their HP will start blinking.
Therefore, it's important to pay careful
attention to the radar.

Do you want to receive an explanation on
how to fight with party members?
・Receive explanation
・Do not receive explanation
Party members automatically enter combat
when they encounter enemies. However, if
it's an important battle, they will ask for
instructions before the start.
If you want to issue an order during a
fight, press  to open up the menu
and  and  to switch to the party
member.
The orders you can give to the main
character are also available for party
members. However, orders such as Move
and Attack are often not available during
non-combat.
When the action completed, the party member
will ask for further instructions. However,
if "Post-Instruction Behaviour" in the
Config Menu is set to AUTO, the character
will not ask for instructions again.
・About "Attack"
・About "Move"
・About "Defend"
・About "Auto"
・End explanation
If you want to instruct your party members
to attack a target, select "Attack",
followed by the target.
However, you cannot select "Attack" unless
your party members are aware of the enemy.
By choosing "Move" you can indicate the
place that you want your party members to
move to. You will be able to select up to
two waypoints. To send a character to a
destination without setting any waypoints,
press the X button twice on that destination.
However, you can't choose "Move" in a place
that is not considered dangerous, such as
in the city.
"Defend" instructs party members to defend.
They will keep defending until the battle
ends or you give another order.
"Auto" tells your party members to act
freely. Instructions previously given will
be canceled.
The behavior of party members can be set to
"Auto" in the "AI Setting" menu that
appears when you press .
Equipment must be equipped for each party
member. Be sure to check the equipment
of new party members.

Choosing Stay or Rest at the inn, will
allow you to recover your HP, MP, and
Special Skills.
Furthermore, choosing Save will allow you
to save your progress.
Choosing CONTINUE will start you off at
the beginning of your last played mission
battle, but its contents will be deleted
when power is turned off.
After you saved, choosing Load will allow
you to start over from the inn in case a
mission battle proves to be too difficult.
It's recommended that you save anytime you
visit an inn.

Would you like an explanation on
equipment and Plates?
・Yes
・No
There are two types of equipment:
weapons and armor.
Weapons
Weapons mainly raise ATK and
increase damage done to enemies.
Armor
Armor mainly raises DEF, and reduces
damage received from enemies.
By getting accustomed to using weapons
and armor, characters will develop
"Plates" necessary for growth.
The developed "Plates" will give
characters various abilities.
Plate 3
Plate 2
Plate 1
Weapons and armor will generate up to
three types of Plates. The menu which
is displayed when equipping items
will show the available Plates.
The numbers one through three indicate the
order in which the Plates will be
generated. This order can be decided at
the time of equipping.
The Plate will be generated when
the Mastery Level Meter becomes full.
Generated Plates are stocked by each
character, but only one of each kind
is created.
Beware that Plates that have already
been generated cannot be generated a
second time.
Do you want to receive an explanation on
the Ability Tree?
・Yes
・No
By putting the developed Plate in the
"Ability Tree", you can acquire various
skills such as magic.
Press  to access the Ability Tree screen.
Ability Tree Screen
The Ability Tree has several Plates set
from the beginning.
Each Plate has a corresponding color.
Orange: Magic Skill, Green: Special Skill,
Blue: Knack.
Each time you defeat an enemy, Knack Points
will be added to the Plates outlined in
yellow.
Plate Growth
Plate Growth
Knack Point Meter
Usually, the maximum level is five.
Some Plates have a maximum level of one.
The Knack Point Meter on each Plate
indicates the amount of accumulated Knack
Points. When this meter is full, the Plate
will gain a level.
If you want to develop a Plate, you
have to allocate Knack Points to it.
The "flow" of Knack Points, which starts
from the leftmost side of the screen,
depends on your equipment.
The color of the arrows on the far left
correspond to the arrow displayed in
front of each piece of equipment. You
can have one flow for each weapons and
armor you have equipped.
Plate Growth
Plate Growth
Plate Growth
Accumulated Knack Points (Armor)
because there is no Plate to allocate them
to.
Accumulated skill points (Armor)
because there is no Plate to allocate them to.
Furthermore, Plates which are inside the
flow will receive a +1 level bonus.
(Up to a maximum of +2)
Level +1
Level +1
The actual level of a Plate is determined by
adding the level bonus to the Plate's base
level.
Actual Plate Level
Actual Plate Level
The same Plate can be set up to a
maximum of two per Ability Tree screen,
but the second one cannot be placed
unless the item Release Limit is used.
By doing so, the levels of the
corresponding Plates will stack.
However, the maximum level is nine.
You can set a Plate that is in your
inventory in an empty position.
If you press  at an empty position...
If you press  at an empty position...
If you press  at an empty position...
...the Plates that are in your
inventory will be displayed.
Let's set a new Plate in order to make the
arrow on the Plate connect to another one.
Two Plates have been connected.
Knack Points are allocated evenly to the
Plates on the linked flow.
Therefore, if you connect a lot of Plates
at the same time, the growth of each Plate
will be slow.
A Plate will not develop any further when
its maximum level has been reached. A good
method is to first concentrate on
developing a few Plates at the same time.
In addition, Knack Points will be stocked
when Plates are not connected.
Please create flows that correspond to how
you want your characters to develop.
I will give you one Plate as a sample.

Do you want to listen to a basic explanation
on Enchanted Gems?
・Receive explanation
・Don't receive explanation
Gem 2
Gem 1
Gem 2
Gem 1
Gem 2
Gem 1
Enchanted Gems are equipment distinct
from weapons and armor that provide
special abilities. Up to 2 can be equipped.
There are various kinds of abilities.
These abilities provide certain effects such
as increasing stats, changing resistances
and attributes, etc.
One Enchanted Gem can provide up to four
abilities.
Ability 1
Ability 2
Ability 3
Ability 4
Some abilities have their own level.
Lv
Lv
Lv
The higher the level, the higher the bonus
that will be added to the ability's level.
For example, in case of "Poison Attack", the
chance of poisoning an opponent will become
higher as the level rises.
In addition to getting Gems from enemies,
you can also create new Gems by combining
them with each other in the Gem Synthesis
Menu.
Do you want to know more about
Gem Synthesis?
・Receive explanation
・Don't receive explanation
The Gem Synthesis Menu can be accessed
from the System Menu, which is opened by
pressing the  button.
Gem Synthesis
Gem Synthesis
Gem Synthesis
There are four things you can do in
Gem Synthesis.
Combine the effects of two Enchanted Gems
into one.
Combine Enchanted Gems with the same effect
to increase the level of that effect.
Combine Gemstones to make a new
Enchantment Gem.
Combine Echanted Gems with Gemstones to
obtain a random result.
・About Gem Synthesis.
・About Combining Effects.
・About Enhancing Effects.
・About Combining Gemstones
・About Combining Ench. Gems and Gemstones
・End the explanation
In order to synthesize Gems, you need to
set the main Gem and the Gem which you
would like to add to it on the Synthesis
Board.
After setting the Gems, fighting repeated
battles will cause the Gems to synthesize.
Planned Synthesis Result
Planned Synthesis Result
Planned Synthesis Result
This occurrence is called Impact.
You will be notified when Impact occurs and
two Gems are synthesized.
At first, you will only be able to set
three pairs of Gems, but this will increase
as you progress through the game.
The order in which the Gem pairs are
synthesized is from top to bottom. When
the bottom pair has been synthesized, the
process will start over again from the top.
If there are several pairs you wish to
synthesize, please set them in advance.
By synthesizing Gems, you can combine
the effects of two Gems into one.
Choose a main Gem and then select another
Gem you would like to add to it.
Planned Synthesis Result
Planned Synthesis Result
Planned Synthesis Result
The planned synthesis result is displayed
on the right side on the screen.
You can check the result in advance by
moving the cursor to it.
Please note that it's not possible to add
more than one of the same effect to the
main Gem.
×
×
×
Furthermore, if there is no change in effect
between the main Gem and the synthesis
result, the synthesis will not be performed.
If you are unsatisfied with the synthesis
result, you can dismantle the Gem back
into two separate ones in case you
possess a dismantle item.
If both Enchanted Gems you would to
synthesize have the same effect, the level
of that effect will increase.
Level 1
Level 2
Level 1
Level 2
After Enhancing
Level 3
After Enhancing
Level 3
After Enhancing
Level 3
Enhancing can only be done to effects that
have levels. The new level is the highest
level +1.
Furthermore, if the effect has reached its
maximum level, it won't be enhanced
further.
In addition to Enchanted Gems, there are
also Gemstones. These cannot be equipped.
Gemstone
Gemstones are not useful under normal
circumstances. However, you can create new
Enchanted Gems by synthesizing Gem Stones.
After Synthesis
If two Gemstones can successfully be
synthesized, a "?" icon will be displayed
on the right. However, if you already
synthesized these Gemstones, the previous
result will be displayed instead.
Aside from obtaining Gemstones from enemies,
you can also obtain them by setting new
Plates. You can have up to 9 of the same
Gemstone.
Gemstone
If you set an Enchanted Gem as the main
Gem and add a Gemstone to it, a random
result will occur. (Nothing will happen if
you swap the position of these two Gems).
A Gem's level might increase, you might
obtain an item, or you might obtain an
unforeseen effect.
However, the result that is most likely to
occur is determined by the type of Gemstone.
Feel free to experiment if you have an
excessive amount of Gemstones.

・Esgrentz Continent
・The Sealed Continent of "Goatland"
A continent dominated by the countries
Fomeros, Hingistan, and Jewarl. It is
the center of our company's activities.
Other names include "The Sacrificed Land"
and "The Closed-off Continent". A
continent that lies across the ocean
and is completely surrounded by a barrier.
No accurate records remain of how the
barrier was created.
Legends passed down in various lands tell
of a world-scale battle 2,000 years ago.
A calamitous being was confined to the
continent and sealed away so that it could
not leave.
And it is said that our current peace is
owed to the sacrifces made by the people
who lived on that continent.
From that time onward, the continent came
to be called "Goatland", which is derived
from the tradition of "Sacrificial Goats".
Since there have been observations of
fluctuations in the barrier, there is
possibility that it will eventually be
lifted.
If there are people living on Goatland,
then that means there is untapped market
potential for our products.
In that case, not only Monopolis, but
also enterprises around the world will be
aiming to get into the Goatland market.
The barrier surrounding the continent
has finally been lifted.
Our company has promptly dispatched
an expedition team.
At the same time, we launched a project
to break into the Goatland market.
・Jewarl
・Hingistan
・Fomeros
In the continent's northeast lies Jewarl.
It's crossed by a mountain range that
divides it in north and south.
In south of Jewarl, where Monopolis is
located, lie Makinus and Dastis. Its
governmental bodies lie in the north.
A nation ruled by the Hingistani royal
family. The gap between rich and poor is
steep due to certain conditions from
which a part of the authority figures
derive profit. As a result, the country
is rampant with terrorist organization
that are aiming to overthrow the
Hingistani royal family.
The Hingistani royal army cracked down on
terrorism and tightened its hold on the
country. However, this simply led to more
people committing terrorist acts.
The first prince was reported to have died
in battle a few days ago. Furthermore, the
second prince has been missing for several
years.
Fomeros sent troops under the pretext of
suppressing the civil war in Hingistan
and protecting its citizens.
The Hingistani army regarded this act as
an invasion, and a war broke out between
the two countries.
Now Formeros' objective has shifted to
liberating the citizens from the despotism
of the Hingistani royal family. As a
result, the war continues to rage on.
One theory is that Fomeros' true objective
is to steal Hingistan's mines. This seems
very credible when looking at the
positions taken up by the Fomerion army.
・Makinus
・Dastis
・El Hingis
・Leystan
・Schizarz
・Royferon
A port city located in south Jewarl. Its
citizens are mostly made up of Monopolis
employees. The city is self-governing
and is under surveillance by the
Monopolis Guard Corps.
Because Makinus is an important source of
finances for Jewarl, its government does

climate.

・Esgrentz Continent
・The Sealed Continent of "Goatland"
A continent dominated by the countries
Fomeros, Hingistan, and Jewarl. It is
the center of our company's activities.
Other names include "The Sacrificed
Land" and "The Closed-off Continent".
A continent that lies across the ocean
and is completely surrounded by a
barrier. No accurate records
remain of how the barrier was
created.
Legends passed down in various lands
tell of a world-scale battle 2,000 years
ago. A calamitous being was confined to the
continent and sealed away so that it could
not leave.
And it is said that our current peace
is owed to the sacrifces made by the people
who lived on that continent.
From that time onward, the continent came
to be called "Goatland", which is derived
from the tradition of "Sacrificial Goats".
Since there have been observations
of fluctuations in the barrier, there is
possibility that it will eventually be
lifted.
If there are people living on Goatland,
then that means there is untapped market
potential for our products.
In that case, not only Monopolis, but
also enterprises around the world will be
aiming to get into the Goatland market.
The barrier surrounding the continent
has finally been lifted.
Our company has promptly dispatched
an expedition team.
At the same time, we launched a project
to break into the Goatland market.
・Jewarl
・Hingistan
・Fomeros
In the continent's northeast lies Jewarl.
It's crossed by a mountain range that divides
it in north and south.
In south of Jewarl, where Monopolis is located,
lie Makinus and Dastis. Its
governmental bodies lie in the north.
A nation ruled by the Hingistani royal family.
The gap between rich and poor is steep due
to certain conditions from which a part
of the authority figures derive profit.
As a result, the country is rampant with
terrorist organization that are aiming to
overthrow the Hingistani royal family.
The Hingistani royal army cracked down on terrorism
and tightened its hold on the country.
However, this simply led to more people
committing terrorist acts.
The first prince was reported to have died in
battle a few days ago. Furthermore, the second prince
has been missing for several years.
Fomeros sent troops under the pretext of
suppressing the civil war in Hingistan
and protecting its citizens.
The Hingistani army regarded this act
as an invasion, and a war broke out
between the two countries.
Now Fomeros' objective has shifted to
liberating the citizens from the despotism of
the Hingistani royal family. As a result, the war
continues to rage on.
One theory is that Fomeros' true objective
is to steal Hingistan's mines. This
seems very credible when looking at
the positions taken up by the Fomerion army.
・Makinus
・Dastis
・El Hingis
・Leystan
・Schizarz
・Royferon
A port city located in south Jewarl. Its citizens
are mostly made up of Monopolis employees. The city is
self-governing and is under surveillance by the Monopolis
Guard Corps.
Because Makinus is an important source of finances for
Jewarl, its government does not actively
intervene in its affairs.
Furthermore, Makinus has become a model city
for Monopolis' new technology and is known
for being the most unpolluted city in the world.
A provincial city situated northeast of Makinus.

We plan to purify soil pollution caused
by industrial wastewater with out company
product Pollumine. Pollumine absorbs
contamination matter from the soil
and stores it inside its fruits. For
that reason, the fruits are harmful. The
collected fruits are safely disposed
of in our processing facilities.
Because Pollumine seeds are expensive,
there are quite a few cities that are
reluctant to introduce it.

The Dog Race Contest?
・Receive explanation about contest
・Participate
・Cancel
The Futon Dogs will run straight to
their owners.
A gauge showing your Futon Dog's
physical strength will be displayed
on the left. This gauge will deplete
while it's running.
Once its physical strength has been
exhausted, it will only be able to run
at the lowest speed possible.
During the contest, press
to make your Futon Dog start dashing.
Please note that during this state,
your Futon Dog's physical strength
will decrease significantly and will
soon run out.
You can cancel the dash by pressing
.
During normal running, you can restore
your Futon Dog's physical strength by
pressing △ repeatedly.
Make full use of these buttons to
make your Futon Dog reach the goal
before any of the others.
You need 500 to participate.
Will you participate?
Very well, I will guide you to the contest
site.
You need 1000 to participate.
Will you participate?
Very well, I will guide you to the contest
site.
You need 2000 to participate.
Will you participate?
Very well, I will guide you to the contest
site.
The Dance Contest?
・Receive explanation about contest
・Participate
・Cancel
Your Futon Dog will dance to three different
music pieces and aim for the highest score.
The music pieces will be displayed at the
beginning of the contest.
Next, set a dance to the following buttons:
,  and Square.
Because there are affinities between
certain dances and music pieces, please
take into account the music when
setting a dance.
Physical strength is needed to complete
a dance. Because your Futon Dog will
perform a dance three times, please consider
its physical strength when choosing
the dances.
When the competition starts, the name
of the piece will be displayed, and the
music will begin. Make sure to press one
of the three earlier mentioned buttons
within two seconds to let your Futon
Dog know which dance it should do.
If you fail to press one of these
buttons within two seconds, your Futon
Dog won't be allowed to perform its
dance that turn.
After that, choose the dance that best matches
the music that is playing by pressing one of the
three buttons, and aim for the highest score.
You can only use each button once,
so keep this in mind when the second
and third music pieces are playing.
The time it takes to press a button also
effects the score, so remember to press
a button as soon as you recognize the
music.
Your final score is a combination
of the points you earned with each
of the three dances, and will be
compared to that of the other Futon Dogs.
Oh? It seems your Futon Dog
hasn't remembered any dances.
Unfortunately, that means it won't
be able to participate in the Dance
Contest.
You need 500 to participate.
Will you participate?
Very well, I will guide you to the contest
site.

The Slime Binge-eating Contest?
・Receive explanation about contest
・Participate
・Cancel
The Futon Dog who eats the most Slimes
within the time limit is the winner.
When a Futon Dog stands in front of
a slime, it eats at a constant speed.
An icon will appear when you stand to
the left or right of the Futon Dog.
If you press  during
that time, you can support your Futon Dog.
In response to this, the rate at which your
Futon Dog eats Slimes will increase.
Your Futon Dog will have eaten one
Slime once the gauge in the upper right
is filled. Please use this as a guide.
After facing the Slime for a while,
the Futon Dog will become unwilling
to eat it and will run away.
Please fetch back your Futon Dog
when that happens. If you approach
the runaway Futon Dog and encourage
it, it will return to the competition.
Please make your Futon Dog eat as much
Slimes as possible.
You need 500 to participate.

The Ball Search Contest?
・Receive explanation on contest
・Participate
・Cancel
The Futon Dog who finds most of the
ten balls buried at the site within the
limit will be the winner.
By pressing ○ you can make
your Futon Dog dig where it's standing.
Because the timer keeps counting down
while your Futon Dog is digging, it's
best to predict where a ball could be
buried to some extent. This way, you
can collect balls more efficiently.
You can make your Futon Dog search
by pressing CROSS.
The direction where the ball is buried
is indicated by the direction your Futon
Dog is facing. The distance is determined
by the way your Futon Dog barks and the icon
it displays.
One bark             Long distance
Two barks            Moderately long distance
!!+ One bark       Moderate distance
!!+ Two barks      Moderately short distance
!!+ Three barks    Short distance
+ three barks　　　　　Right underneath
Your Futon Dog will not be able to search
if it's too far away or if its Discipline
stat and Loyalty is too low. The number
of searches will increase in accordance
with its Discipline stat and Loyalty.
Make the most of your Futon Dog's search
ability to find the most balls at the site.

・Receive explanation on dogfight
・Challenge
・Don't challenge
Your Futon Dog will engage in a
one-on-one fight with the reigning
champion Ellon. You simply have to
win.
There will attack turns and defense
turns during the dogfight.
Your Futon Dog's attack turn consists
of two parts: Alertness Check and
Determine Attack Location.
Alertness Check will tell you
on which side your opponent is
alert and on which side he is less
alert.
The higher the Smell stat and Loyalty
of your Futon Dog, the more likely it
is to find a weakpoint in its opponent's
defense.
During Determine Attack Location, you
will decide from side your Futon Dog
will attack its opponent.
The higher your Futon Dog's overall
stats, the higher the chance it will
land a critical hit.
You can further improve the chance to find
a weakspot or land a critical hit by making
use of boosts.
During the defense turn, your Futon Dog
will defend against its opponent's attacks.
Likewise, you can make use of boosts to
raise the chance of a successful defense.
The number of boosts is limited and will
increase or decrease depending on your
Futon Dog's stats.
Use boosts when you need them,
lower your opponent's HP, and make
sure the HP of your own Futon Dog stays
high. That is the road to victory.
Challenge Ellon?

・Don't challenge

be able to move between the activated
Transgates. That's why you need to have
restored two or more Transgates to make
use of them. To use a Transgate, select
your destination and press .

that help improve Yurii's stats. They can
be obtained during battle. Using a Rana

ability. Please keep in mind that if you
focus too much on improving one particular
stat, Yurii won't be able to easily learn
new abilities.

The fact that you are reading this
letter means that you must have
escaped safely. Thanks to you my
country's soldiers weren't shot by
the cannon. What good news!

Leystan, but on the way I was found
by soldiers, and I don't have time
to wait for your return. Please
forgive the fact that I could only
leave you a letter. Thank you very
much. I will hide myself for a little
while. I think we will meet again
somewhere. After we meet again, let
me thank you properly.
Until then, take care! ~Hofman~
